subtitle: Ankle area pain — location not pinpointed

strava_risk_triggers.risk_note: Ankle pain often reflects footwear, terrain, or stability issues

mild.description: General ankle stiffness or aching after runs
mild.can_run_note: Yes — try to identify whether inner or outer ankle
why: Ankle joint stress from accumulated mileage
Ankle stiffness from inadequate mobility work
Footwear not appropriate for foot type
relief: Ankle circles and alphabet tracing before and after runs
Check shoe wear pattern for clues about foot strike
prevention: Ankle mobility and stability work daily
Use this app to identify specific structure for targeted treatment

moderate.description: Ankle pain affecting running or walking
why: Specific ankle structure under stress — needs identification
relief: Reduce mileage and identify specific location using this app
prevention: Address root cause once structure is identified
Return with clear diagnosis and structured plan
